title: Define agents/raven/manifest.json with purpose, scope, capabilities, risk class
Implement agents/raven/index.ts exporting plan(), act(), reflect(), learn()
Add raven.config.ts (models, context windows, budgets, routing rules)
Create agents/raven/skills/ registry (fs, git, test, doc, refactor, balance, sim)
Provide agents/raven/adapters/llm.ts supporting local (Ollama) → paid fallback (gated)
Introduce policies/branch_lanes.yaml (feat/fix/refactor/agent/docs)
Require Raven to never push main; PRs only; small diffs; 1 concern/PR
Budget guard middleware for /api/raven/* with daily/PR caps
No Lies verifier: forbid green messages without artifacts (diff, test, URL)
Build import graph graph/codegraph.sqlite (ts-ast + tsserver)
Index content embeddings (per file, per section) with tags (domain, layer)
Planner = (goal, constraints, graph) → DAG of PUs (≤ 200 nodes)
Each PU typed: DocPU, TestPU, RefactorPU, FixturePU, GamePU
Translate PU → branch → commits (atomic; small)
If CI green & policy ok → add automerge label
Add sim/harness.ts (deterministic ticks, seed)
TokenGuard cascade: local → distilled → paid (off by default)
No-Lies smoke suite hits all public routes + critical commands
Require artifact presence for any success toast
Bootstrap Raven: Set RAVEN_ENABLED=true, wire registerRavenRoutes(app), point at Ollama
